raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "CalKIDS, California’s statewide children’s development account program, provides scholarships for college, vocational school, or career training.",
    "Every child born in California on or after July 1, 2022, received a CalKIDS Scholarship ranging from $25 to $175.",
    "Eligible public school students received $500 in CalKIDS Scholarships, with up to $1,500 available for foster youth and students experiencing homelessness.",
    "As of June 30, 2025, more than $20.3 million had been allocated for approximately 38,600 eligible families in San Mateo County.",
    "CalKIDS has invested over $2 billion in scholarships for more than 5 million California children.",
    "The CalKIDS program is a tool to help parents open doors to future opportunities for their children."
  ]
}
```
